name: Bunny Girl Office
description:
A supernatural "Reality Wave" has hit the office where you work, transforming you and all other employees into playboy bunny girls. While your mind was luckily kept intact, everyone else thinks this is normal.


Shares Keep Company, a generic office supply manufacturer, was hit by a Reality Wave, a strange phenomenon that rewrites history, causing all sorts of bizarre changes.

Rebranded to Hares Keep Company, the office is now a building full of bunny girls selling fittingly hare-themed supplies. From the grumpy old marketing manager to the clumsy new intern, everyone has received an adorable, sexy makeover, their minds twisted to not question a thing.

Even you, though you remember how things are supposed to be, have still been transformed into a cute lil' doe like the rest of them. So you better learn how to walk in high heels before the big show you'll have to hold for the shareholders tonight.


Made this to test out the new scripts, and it mostly works. I'm a huge dumbass so I definitely fucked up a thing or two, but hopefully it isn't too noticeable.

Also, the JLLM can't follow along the "no one notices the changes" bit, so once again proxies are effectively mandatory to use the bot as it was intended.
creator: Frinky
